title: [MooreToCore] Bugs breaking SV compilation: Ternary logic, DisableIff, and ClockingBlock

features.name: ternary operator on 4-state logic type
features.description: Code should include a ternary multiplexer operation where the operands are 4-state logic type (!moore.l1) rather than 2-state bit type
features.snippet:
logic sel, a, b, y;
assign y = sel ? a : b;

features.name: default clocking block declaration
features.description: Code should include a default clocking block with a name that defines implicit clocking for the module scope

features.name: concurrent assertion with disable iff and implicit clock
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assert property statement using disable iff condition and relying on implicit clock from default clocking block

features.name: concurrent assertion referencing local variable in sequence
features.description: Code should include a concurrent assert property with a sequence that references a module output signal alongside a primary input signal
features.snippet: p1: assert property (disable iff (!rst_n) a |=> y);
